content:
Buzznity is a full business website solutions company. If a business needs something built or maintained online, there's a good chance we can build it: WhatsApp and custom bots, websites, apps, custom UI design, hosting and VPS management, and ongoing support that doesn't disappear after launch.
### Why we don't just do one thing
I started out in 2024 in social media marketing, then picked up API integrations, payment gateways, and eventually full-stack development — mostly self-taught, mostly by building things a client actually needed at the time. That pattern never really stopped. A client needing a WhatsApp bot would also need a website. A website client would need hosting. Hosting clients would need ongoing support.
Rather than send people elsewhere for the rest, we built the capability to handle it ourselves.
### What that looks like today
- **Bots** — WhatsApp AI assistants, and custom bots for other use cases
- **Websites** — built from scratch, not templated
- **Apps** — for businesses that need more than a website
- **Custom UI** — design work that actually matches the brand, not a generic theme
- **Hosting & VPS** — set up and managed, not just handed over
- **Full support** — a real team behind it, not a ticket system that goes quiet
### Who's behind it
Buzznity is run by myself, Sudipta Kumar Das (Owner, Founder, CEO, Developer & Head), together with my Co-Owner and Co-Founder, Sribas Das, who's also a developer on everything we build. We're also behind Buzznity Panel Service, an SMM panel development venture, which is where a lot of our shared experience with automation actually started.
### The idea behind all of it
Every website owner deserves a friendly team behind them, honest pricing, and support that actually picks up the phone. That's the standard we hold ourselves to whether we're building a WhatsApp bot, a full website, or just keeping a VPS running smoothly.
If you want to see what any of this looks like for your business, you can reach out at [buzznity.in](https://buzznity.in).
---
Buzznity — where growth is simple, honest, and real.
Owner & Founder :- Sudipta Kumar Das
